div.h2: Comprehensive failure scenarios with recovery paths

div.h3: Timeline: Candidate receives 2 votes, needs 3 (5-node cluster)
Timeline: Follower votes, then crashes before sending RPC response

ol.li: Election Safety: Only one leader per term.
Leader Completeness: New leaders must have all committed entries.
Persistence: State is flushed to disk before responding.
Vote request to F3 never finishes
No heartbeats are sent to cluster

div.p: T+150ms: F1's election timeout fires T+155ms: F1 → Candidate (term=6) T+160ms: F1 sends RequestVote(T=6) to F2, F3, F4 T+170ms: F1 wins majority, becomes Leader

ul.li: Node A stays down until restart

text.tspan: // PROTECT: Ignore if term changed or stepped down
// PROTECT: Ignore if term changed or stepped down
